prerequisites.value: Worshiper of a god of drunkenness or similar.

description.value: **Benefit:** When you have had at least a number of drinks equal to your Constitution modifier (or get drunk or soused, if you are using the drunkenness rules) in a tavern, once within the following 24 hours, you can gain the benefits of remove paralysis as a free action. Alternatively, you can choose one of the following benefits depending on the type of bar you patronized. At the GMâs discretion, other types of taverns might grant other benefits. Gambling Den: You can gain the benefits of detect thoughts for 1 minute as a free action. Illegal Tavern: You can gain the benefits of invisibility for 1 minute as a free action. Posh Tavern: You can gain the benefits of eagleâs splendor for 1 minute as a free action. Private Club: You can gain the benefits of undetectable alignment for 1 minute as a free action. Rowdy Bar: You can gain the benefits of bearâs endurance for 1 minute as a free action. Tavern of Intrigue: You can gain the benefits of foxâs cunning for 1 minute as a free action.
